data: Fine to medium-grained, banded, grey, calcitic (with dolomite) marble, likely Proconnesian. Optical microscopy: heteroblastic fabric with mortar microstructure. Digital microscopy: heteroblastic fabric. with dolomite (identification based on digital microscopy, XRD, optical microscopy, stable isotopes analysis, EPR, LA-ICP-MS)

Epig. late 3rd century CE (Manni
                                Piraino); Sarcoph 4th century CE, pref. late (Tusa)
Poss. Catacomb of S. Maria di Gesu
I.Sicily with the permission of the Assessorato Regionale dei Beni Culturali e dell’Identità Siciliana - Dipartimento dei Beni Culturali e dell’Identità Siciliana
Partially reopened following extensive restoration work. Comprehensive collection of archaeological material, predominantly from the West of the island, with an important Etruscan collection.
Centre of Palermo, Piazza Olivella 24, 90100 - Palermo
